text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's summer, and we're discussing how to train for
the Kikuka Sho on a beach near camp...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! I'm really fretting here! Honestly, I
don't know how much help I can be to Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, Ryan. How reassuring to have you
here. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Nah, my poses might be empowering, but I'm real
anxious over here...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If you're looking for an edge in medium-distance
races, I'm your gal. But those long races? And
especially those 3000-meter ones? I don't think
I've got the stuff...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Me? Geez, I'd be even less help than Ryan. I've
been on a break since I won the Derby, and I've
never run in a longer race before either.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If you're looking for someone to coach Bright for
the Kikuka Sho, there's definitely a better
candidate out there. Think about it!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Just leave the rest to her!
Do your best out there, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I guess she's right... There's someone else
who's way better equipped for long-distance
training than Ines and I would be.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, Bright. How about betting on
you-know-who? The Mejiro family boasts all kinds
of Umamusume, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When the race you're aiming for changes, it's best
to switch to a coach who knows that race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to come up with a new training regimen
that'll put us in good stead to take on the
challenges of the fall season.
